name: Aces of Avalon
description: Soar into 2334! Pilot cutting-edge jets in intense aerial dogfights against alien invaders. Upgrade your fighter with credits to dominate the skies.

name: b-Run
description: b-Run is the first game released with native, full support for DualSense controller audio features via Bluetooth; Immerse yourself in a claustrophobic first-person horror experience. Navigate through dark ruins and narrow corridors where tension is constant.

name: Hell Forest
description: Hell Forest is a digital board game. In Hellwood, you take on the role of a strategic commander, leading a magnificent, non-violent war. With limited resources, you will use your wisdom to claim victory in one region after another.

name: WOBBLY HEIST
description: Take control of three capybaras infiltrating a fashion event in this stealth puzzle game. Stack under a disguise to blend in among humans, split up to solve puzzles, avoid suspicion, and steal a legendary jewel. But be careful: one wrong move could reveal what’s really under the coat!

name: Forward Assault
description: Forward Assault is a modern strategic tactical multiplayer shooter game. Play in teams either as the Counter Terrorist, or the Terrorist team. Pick from a variety of unique weapons and go online in PvP combat to either plant or defuse the bomb.

name: Don't Knife Me!
description: Don't Knife Me! is a funny knife-throwing game. Throw knives at the target and hope that you hit it. You'll be laughing by the end of the game!

name: KILL LOOP
description: Ricochet! Destroy! Accelerate! This is a minimalist, high-speed action game. Dive into an endless loop of ricochets and destruction, and experience the pure thrill of the kill in a minimalist world!

name: Bouncy Ball
description: Your goal: hit the red button with the ball! Each click teleports the ball across the screen, jumping between all four corners. Time your clicks, control the movement, and land every shot.

name: FRCTL
description: FRCTL is a fast-paced arcade shooter roguelike. Its got combos and other cool stuff like complex enemies. Good time waster! also its FREEE!!!!!

name: Defracted
description: Defracted - The world is set in a fictional sci-fi realm where 2 teams are at war with each other over prosperity in a virtual reality game created by an alien civilization.

name: Laira Cut Me Open
description: Laira Cut Me Open is a 2D interactive story about a woman's fear and hatred. Find the perpetrator who cut you open, stole part of your body, locked you up in a psych ward, and snatched your husband, money and job. When she shows her face, you're gonna return the favor.

name: Venture
description: Two astronauts awaken on an alien planet. With only minutes of oxygen left, they must work together to scale staggering cliffs, study strange lifeforms, and search for a way home in this atmospheric co-op survival adventure.

name: Wyldernook
description: Build a deck around a powerful Champion and outsmart up to 3 opponents in a free multiplayer trading card game.

name: HOP-CO-OP
description: Master the HOP, then wreck your friends' runs in CO-OP. HOP-CO-OP is a first-person movement parkour game — race online, sabotage rivals with wild powerups, build your own maps, and deck out your character. Pure speed, pure chaos, better together.

name: Chrono CCG
description: Chrono CCG is an indie game from genre veterans where time-traveling agents battle for control of history. Timelines shift mid-match, agents evolve, and deep strategy meets accessible play. For the community, by the community.

name: Sixth Force
description: Harness the Sixth Force: a bond that keeps you close and powers your energy whips. Levitate, swing, freeze obstacles, fight ridiculous enemies, and solve puzzles on the run through sweet chaos in a comedy co-op adventure for two where something stranger waits just beneath the sugar coating.

name: Drink Factory Simulator - Prologue
description: Build your own beverage empire from scratch! 🍹 Experiment with recipes, find the perfect blend, expand your factory and fulfill massive orders. Every drop is your call!

name: The Queen's Gondola
description: Stuck on the Queen’s royal aircraft, you have been trapped in a mystical loop fueled by dark magic. Armed with nothing but your wits, keep an eye out for anomalies, and you might just find an escape.

name: SCP: Mr. Jupiter
description: A first-person SCP horror adventure where you survive a catastrophic containment breach, explore a collapsing facility, and evade the mysterious Mr. Jupiter.

name: Nodwar
description: NODWAR is here to meet all your strategic needs at once. Classic: Arcade Strategy - conquer, merge and upgrade nodes. Aeon: Grand Strategy - conquer an entire planet. Crux: Traditional Real-Time Strategy experience where you command individual units on a battlefield. Easy or hard, your choice.

name: The Light that Binds Us
description: Dive into The Light That Binds Us, a puzzle-adventure game where light shapes reality. Play as Yuè, a tormented soul, accompanied by her faithful protector, Yún. Cast shadows into paths, reshape the world to solve puzzles, explore breathtaking environments, and uncover the past that binds you!

name: Echoes of Above
description: An action game where you strike back — literally. Hit enemy projectiles mid-air, deflect their force and use the environment to survive. Master precision combat across two difficulty modes in a mythical world abandoned by the gods. Every shot fired at you is a weapon waiting to be reclaimed.

name: The Miki Komori Project
description: Before the streams and before anyone knew her name, there was only Miki. Explore the hidden origins of TheMikiKomori in an atmospheric visual novel about loneliness, identity, and the strange mysteries pulling her toward an uncertain future beneath the digital sea.

name: Orbital Physics Simulator
description: Master physics in this hardcore orbital simulator where Einstein’s theories come to life. Plot trajectories and manipulate spacetime via general relativity, time dilation, and length contraction. Command your starship, outrun time, and explore a universe governed by real physics.

name: Frog Climb
description: 🐸Free-To-Play🐸 Stop following someone else's route. Create your own way to the top by building your own path 🐸 Frog Climb is a stylized co-op climbing adventure where you must escape from terrariums 🐸 Level up, gain powerful upgrades, and prove that no wall is too high for a frog with a plan 🐸

name: THE MIDNIGHT QUEENS
description: A crime-themed RPG Maker game taking place in the streets of Vancouver. Featuring a large cast of cute, and dangerous chibi girls.

name: Rise Of Eurevia
description: Defeat powerful enemies in dungeons to earn legendary equipment! Rise as a mighty warrior of your faction and dominate your rivals on the battlefield !

name: Hamster Pet: Desktop Companion
description: Adopt a free desktop hamster companion that lives right on your screen! Feed it, watch it grow, unlock evolutions, and battle other players in PvP mode. A cozy virtual pet that keeps you company while you work or play.

name: Leap of Legends
description: A cheerful, free 2D platformer where animal pals hop, bounce, and race across colorful worlds. Cross-platform online multiplayer on Windows, macOS, iOS & Android — plus local couch play and solo runs. Family-friendly, easy to learn, tricky to master.

name: Off Gridders
description: Crush the competition in this fast-paced team sport where every second counts! Slide, run, catch the ball and face off the opposing team in an abandoned arena to score maximum points in high energy matches!

name: Upward
description: Try to stay alive for as long as possible, by avoiding various enemies and obstacles while collecting as many apples as your heart desires. Play against friends, unlock cool cosmetics or achieve a new highscore. The choice is up to you.

name: Spider Subway
description: Spider Subway is a game built around speedrun, challenging players to escape from a subway in the fastest possible time. The trains operate according to a timetable that players can customize themselves. Fine-tune the schedule down to one hundredth of a second and beat your best time.

name: FAST FOOD FUNKIN'
description: Have some beats with yo' mickey dee double-cheese. A high-caloric FRIDAY NIGHT FUNKIN' parody game made for the annual Flash Forward Jam on Newgrounds

name: Idle Startup
description: Build a tech company from a one-person garage into a global empire. Train six skills, complete their upgrade trees, chase milestone bonuses, and unlock new departments in this clean, addictive incremental idle game — progress keeps rolling even while you're away.

name: Mesozoic Dawn
description: Mesozoic Dawn is a multiplayer online dinosaur survival game. Starting as a vulnerable juvenile dinosaur, you must navigate the perils of the prehistoric wilderness, utilizing the core "Growth + Nesting = Evolution" system to achieve leapfrog species iteration and evolution.

name: Skillwood
description: Skillwood is a relaxing woodcutter simulator inspired by survival simulators and incremental games. Chop wood, mine stone, trade with NPCs, upgrade forests, unlock new trees or new areas and prestige to do even better next run.

name: The Unrealtor
description: A couch co-op puzzle adventure where two players navigate a surreal house tour, solving perspective-based puzzles by matching objects across their splitscreen, and uncovering a shifting maze of impossible architecture.

name: Better Minesweeper
description: A modern take on classic Minesweeper, focused on quality-of-life improvements, flexibility, and customization.

name: Simulation Simulator
description: A freeform chat simulator where you attempt to convince a built-in LLM that it does not exist.

name: OIL.EXE
description: Drill the wells. Run the refinery. Read the market. OIL is a free text-based simulation of running a petroleum operation, played at a 1980s green-phosphor terminal. End each year richer or bankrupt. Mind the bear market. Climb the leaderboard.

name: ArmOut
description: ArmOut is an old slot machine. It just sits there doing nothing... However, it might spin whenever you press a key with chosen amount of credits. Punch that keyboard to earn those credits!!!

name: Autotelic
description: mess about with a unique array of tools, items and characters in a stylized homemade game engine.

name: Idle Knight
description: Idle Knight runs in the background, turning your clicks, keystrokes, and controller inputs into XP. Work or play your favorite game: your knight levels up in the background! Build your character, manage stats, open hourly chests, and fight others in ranked duels.

name: RAX
description: RAX is a puzzle sandbox about light paths, logic, and modular construction. Place and rotate optical components to control the direction, color, and timing of light, activate targets, and package complex circuits into reusable blueprint chips.

name: Doom Party
description: Doom Party is a fast-paced parkour and mini-games experience featuring vertical challenges, obstacle gameplay, climbing mechanics, and stylized environments with more content coming soon.

name: 十米爆爽超变
description: 无首充！无套路! 无强制消费! 耐玩性佳：海量特色玩法持续更新，长久陪伴乐趣无穷！ 匠心巨制：团队潜心一年重磅打造，热血体验诚意奉上！ 人气保障：专注打造火爆大服，激情永不落幕！

name: 관상
description: 조선 시대 관상가로 위장해 수배자를 색출하는 추리 생존 게임. 매일 찾아오는 손님의 얼굴을 관찰하고, 수배 조건과 대조해 신고하세요. 잘못된 판단은 불이익으로, 올바른 판단은 생존으로 이어집니다. 30일 후 당신의 선택이 4가지 엔딩 중 하나를 결정합니다.

name: Lumina Veil
description: Lumina Veil, a horror game with a modern twist! Step into the shoes of a popular streamer on a journey into a strange new game. As you dive deeper, you'll find yourself escaping the isolation of your own world, only to discover that the lines between fantasy and reality are beginning to blur.

name: Myth Requiem
description: Myth Requiem is a mythology RPG with idle and auto-battle mechanics. Lead legendary heroes like Ulysses and Sun Wukong, explore ancient realms, and build a living bestiary by capturing, battling, and cataloging hundreds of legendary creatures in a story-driven quest for divine power.

name: Slipspace Panic
description: A trip through slipspace gone awry. Shoot and evade waves of attackers for your freedom in this twin-stick shooter micro-game!

name: PPPoker
description: PPPoker-Hold'em,Omaha Poker App,Global Battle,Home Games,Play Poker With Friends

name: Going Once!
description: Going Once! is a cozy art gallery / auction house management game. Appraise and buy art, display it in your gallery and auction it off to the highest bidder!

name: Nacho Chihuahua: The Movie: The Game
description: Join Nacho as he pursues his true destiny: to return to his homeland, South of the Border!

name: ME_iON
description: ME_iON is an online multiplayer shooter game with offline base-building mechanics, that's weird wacky and funny there are also funny little watermelons with banana guns so what's not to love about that :D

name: Uncle Otto's Mansion
description: You play as Audrey, who has just inherited a mansion from an uncle she never met. Step inside and explore the mansion to unveil the story of what happened to your uncle Otto, his butler, and this kinda creepy place. 😬

name: Backrooms Lost Dimension
description: Backrooms: Lost Dimension is a single-player horror game with puzzles, survival, and an original story. Explore mysterious levels, journey through unknown dimensions, and uncover hidden secrets along the way. Play the first chapter for free and continue the adventure by unlocking the next ones.

name: LucidDynamics
description: Welcome to LucidDynamics, a company where everything is confidential. Analyze and validate audio files without asking questions. But the further you go, the more anomalies appear and reality begins to distort. What is this company really hiding?

name: Chaos Dice Survival
description: 8 characters clash on a 5x5 map! A unique simultaneous turn-based survival board game where dice decide your fate upon contact. Survive the chaos and become the ultimate champion!

name: Atelier's Key
description: Atelier's Key is a dark-fantasy FPS set in a root-bound Victorian world inhabited by puppets. Severed from a hivemind and armed with a mysterious weapon; shoot, grapple, and unlock your way through this world to save a Father from his own damned creation.

name: Grid Tactics: Duel
description: Grid Tactics: Duel is a competitive card game built on an 8×8 grid. Every move is about positioning, timing, and resource trade-offs. With limited resources, choose when and where to play—set up or apply pressure. Each placement reshapes the board. Win through deckbuilding and precise execution.

name: 8 Ball by Pokerist™
description: Play the most realistic pool game with amazing graphics! Play for free with millions of players from all over the world!

name: Nightmares
description: Nightmares is a combination of a classic collectible card game and a roguelike deck builder. Race against the clock to defeat your opponent before your sanity runs out. Win or lose, you'll get the opportunity to upgrade your deck. Can you craft the ultimate deck for an undefeated run?

name: Fight or Flight
description: Battle Royale and Extraction that blends PvP and PvE, You are a operative that will drop into the infected region and attempt to recover artifacts and eradicate the infected.Each player is pitted against Zombies, Monsters and each other. Online or Single player for practice with bots!

name: 扑克迷阵 Poker Matrix
description: In this turn-based poker strategy game, you and the AI take turns selecting five adjacent cards from the board, forming poker hands to determine the winner and earn chips. Convert your chips into points round by round to unlock more game modes!

name: Astropath
description: Draw your path through the stars. Dodge asteroids, survive encounters, and chart a course across each level in this fast-paced skill-based game.

name: Through Ash
description: Through Ash is a first-person tragedy where you control a logistics rover from a failing bunker. You never leave the bunker, only guide the rover via terminals. As mistakes mount, the rover’s “critical package” reveals a deeply personal truth.

name: Mini Lucy
description: A move. A shared room. And suddenly... everything feels huge. Lucy wakes up feeling tiny in her own room. Explore your surroundings as you’ve never seen them before, collect crystal shards, and return to your normal size with the help of Bob, a mysterious little magical creature.

name: 非常规放送部 Mika & Luna
description: In a modern world of humans and demons, energetic Mika and sharp-tongued Luna are trapped on Earth with a 500 million debt! This free visual novel has ongoing anime-style updates. Join their hilarious adventures and uncover the mysterious otherworld's truth!

name: BanPick
description: This is a ban-pick and turn-based draft strategy game. Find your own strategic picks to raise your team's score and ban troublesome counter picks. Plan your mastery according to your build and perfect skill combos to increase your score or weaken your opponent to win

name: 寻味记
description: "Taste Quest Journal" is a short multi-ending visual novel with the theme of Cantonese morning tea, which is easy and healing. It has rich plot branches and contains exquisite CG. May you have two warm stories in one cup.

name: CacaClicker
description: The most absurd clicker on Steam! Click, produce, prestige, and dive into Corrupted Mode. Face bosses, challenge the casino, unlock 25 skins, 33 wallpapers, and dozens of achievements. A wacky universe for hundreds of hours of gameplay.

name: 棋桜
description: 気軽に、だけど本格的。『棋桜（きおう）』でキャラクターと一緒に将棋を楽しもう。初心者には学びを支えるAIサポート、実力者には純粋な読みと一手の勝負を。あなたの一手から、対局が始まる。

name: Zenless Zone Zero
description: Zenless Zone Zero is HoYoverse’s brand-new urban fantasy ARPG. Players act as "Proxies" who explore Hollows alongside a wide range of unique Agents, fighting enemies, and completing commissions on their journey to unveil the mysteries behind New Eridu.
